requirement: [Memory Allocation] Support alignment requirements of 256 bytes, 4KB, 64KB, and 2MB page sizes

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with 256 bytes alignment requirement
steps: Allocate memory with 256 bytes alignment requirement
Verify the memory allocation is successful
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with 256 bytes alignment

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with 4KB alignment requirement
steps: Verify the memory allocation is successful
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with 4KB alignment

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with 64KB alignment requirement
steps: Verify the memory allocation is successful
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with 64KB alignment

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with 2MB alignment requirement
steps: Verify the memory allocation is successful
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with 2MB alignment

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with edge-case alignment requirements
steps: Allocate memory with various edge-case alignment requirements
Verify the memory allocation is successful for each case
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with edge-case alignment requirements

test_cases.description: Validate performance of memory allocation with different alignment requirements
steps: Allocate memory with different alignment requirements multiple times
Measure the time taken for each allocation
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation performance meets acceptable criteria for all alignment requirements

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation with alignment requirements in an integrated system
preconditions: Integrated system with memory allocation feature is set up
steps: Allocate memory with alignment requirements in the integrated system
Verify the memory allocation is successful and does not impact system functionality
test_cases.expected_result: Memory is successfully allocated with alignment requirements in the integrated system
